overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded protagonist exploring a sunlit ancient Egyptian city with classical stone architecture. The character walks along cobblestone streets past a large sphinx statue, enters a courtyard filled with rugs and pottery, and exits back to the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Egyptian colonnaded street with large vases

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone-paved street beside tall columns and decorative vases

notable_agents.action: riding a camel along the street toward the camera

entered.detail: row of tall stone columns with decorative capitals lining the right side of the street
large ceramic vase with black and gold patterns sitting on stone platform
irregular stone cobblestones forming the street surface
tall stone obelisk visible in the distance against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit ancient Egyptian street lined with stone colonnades on the right. Large decorative vases sit on platforms beside the columns, and a distant obelisk is visible ahead. A camel rider approaches from the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with monumental sphinx statue

events.description: exiting the colonnaded street into an open plaza with a large sphinx statue
turning left to walk around the left side of the sphinx statue

agents.ego_description: approaching the massive sphinx statue and turning left to walk around its base

entered.detail: massive stone sphinx with detailed headdress lying on a raised platform
stone building with red fabric awning over the entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by a massive recumbent sphinx statue. The character turns left to walk around the statue's base, passing from the colonnaded street into an open area with buildings featuring red awnings.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with shops and red awnings

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past buildings with red awnings and decorative entrances

entered.detail: large carved wooden door with metal studs set in stone frame
palm tree in large decorative planter beside building entrance

segments.scene_description: Having passed the sphinx, the character walks along a commercial street lined with stone buildings featuring red fabric awnings. Large wooden doors and potted plants mark the entrances to shops and residences.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard with rugs and pottery market

events.description: entering a covered courtyard from the outdoor street, transitioning from cobblestone to tiled floor with rugs

agents.ego_description: walking into the interior courtyard and exploring the pottery and rug displays

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a display table with goods
child in pink dress standing near the vendor

entered.detail: covered courtyard space with stone columns and diffused sunlight
red and beige geometric patterned rugs covering the stone floor
large terracotta and green ceramic vases arranged near the walls
low wooden tables displaying various goods and pottery

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered interior courtyard from the street, transitioning from bright sunlight to diffused light filtering through columns. The floor is covered with patterned rugs, and large clay vases and wooden display tables fill the space. A vendor and child stand near the back wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with walls and cypress trees

events.description: exiting the covered courtyard back to the outdoor cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: exiting the courtyard and continuing down the street past tall cypress trees

entered.detail: tall stone wall with climbing ivy marking the courtyard boundary
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the right side of the street
tall stone monument or mausoleum visible at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The character exits the courtyard back to the sunlit street, passing a stone wall with ivy on the left. Tall cypress trees line the right side of the cobblestone path, and a stone monument is visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit Egyptian city, transitioning from open colonnaded streets into a shaded interior courtyard before returning to the bright outdoors. It begins along a stone thoroughfare lined with decorative vases and a distant obelisk, moving past an approaching camel rider as the path opens into a wide plaza. The camera then circles the base of a massive recumbent sphinx, shifting from the open square toward a commercial street characterized by red fabric awnings and potted plants. As the character moves inward, the scene transitions from brilliant sunlight to the diffused light of a semi-covered courtyard filled with patterned rugs, clay vases, and local vendors. Finally, the camera exits the courtyard back into the glare of the sun, passing an ivy-covered wall and tall cypress trees that line the cobblestone path toward a distant stone monument.
